notes: In theory your most consistent combo, but due to the 2LP, 2HK link being 1 frame, it is not reliable and is usually not used.
Go-to confirm from 2LK on standing opponents. Adjust 2LK count based on disance.
Link from 2LP into 2MK. Do not delay the cancel from 2LK into 2LP, or else the 214HK will not connect in time after 2MK.
Link from 2LP into 2HP / cl.HP. Technically can be done from 2LK but it is unreliable and not recommended.
Same link with a Shakunetsu ender for crouchers. It is best to start from down-back so the 41236 motion is easier.
Your usual hitconfirm on crouchers, you can also use Shakunetsu Hadoken here.
Damaging double 2MP link, optimal in most cases where 2MP hits point blank. You can substitute 2MP for 2MK at farther ranges.
Your go-to shorthop combo. Nice reward for a tricky overhead landing.
If done in the corner, the Shakunetsu Hadoken will knock the opponent down while keeping Ryu at mid-range, meaning you can react to attempts to get out of the corner like rolls or jumping.
Max damage cross-up combo.
Coloquially known as "short short super." Extremely vital combo to learn for your super confirms.
More time to confirm compared to the above combo, but includes a link, slightly increasing the difficulty.

Pretty simple combo, 2HP makes the combo easier since you are starting from down, but cl.HP works as well. It is recommended to hold HP during the 2HP/cl.HP so you don't accidentally get negative edge HP Hadoken.
The double medium link again. Can sub in 2MK here.
Best available Shinkuu Hadoken combo. Consistent and damaging.
An extremely damaging Shin Shoryuken combo.
Optimal Lvl.2 cancel, you can do another 236236P if you want but it is recommended to conserve a bar of meter to prepare another lvl.2 super in C.
Spends an extra bar from the above route. Not recommended to use unless it is for kill.
Link from 2LP into 2MK, canceled into a level 2 super which is canceled into an HK Tatsu. Like the meterless variant of this starter, be quick with the 2LK > 2LP chain.
Damage increase from the above combo but for more meter.
A situational combo with a tight juggle. Not used due to it not doing enough damage.
Same as above route but with a different starter.
